title: Niekie3202s Multiplayer Pack
description: Multiplayer Pack is the best modpack to have fun and to play with friends!
body:
Multiplayer Pack is the best modpack to have fun and to play with friends!

In this modpack are the best mods to make playing minecraft with all of your friends the best experience! With mods like Simple Voice Chat, Chat Heads and the essential mods is it way esier to play with friends!

This modpack has a lot of optimization, such as sodium, ModernFix and Chunky for more FPS.

This modpack also includes some mods that should be in vanilla, like appleskin, inventory blur, Just Enough items and Shulker box Tooltip. This modpack has some mods like a world map, litematica and Elytra Slot too, to make it easier and more fun to play minecraft.

I have included some resource packs and shaders to this pack, but feel free to decide what you use and what not! After all, that's what Minecraft is for.
